name: firefox-extension
description: Hutch — Firefox browser extension for saving URLs to a reading list

scripts.compile: tsc && HUTCH_SERVER_URL=https://hutch-app.com node scripts/build-extension.js && web-ext build --source-dir dist-extension-compiled --artifacts-dir dist-extension-files --overwrite-dest --filename hutch-$(git rev-parse --short=6 HEAD).xpi
scripts.test-with-coverage: pnpm compile && c8 node scripts/run-tests-with-coverage.js && node enforce-coverage.config.js
scripts.check-infra: if [ "$CLAUDECODE" = 1 ]; then echo 'Skipping check-infra in Claude Code environment'; else PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE='' pulumi preview --stack prod; fi
scripts.check: pnpm compile && pnpm lint && pnpm test-with-coverage && pnpm check-infra
scripts.ext:run: HUTCH_SERVER_URL=https://hutch-app.com node scripts/build-extension.js && web-ext run --source-dir dist-extension-compiled
